results.output: The draft is ready: [Open draft in Spark](https://sparkmailapp.com/dpl/bl?token=EXAMPLE4470)

```bash
spark draft --reply-to 6601 --body "Hi Bob, just following up on this. Let me know when you've had a chance to review."
```

```bash
spark draft --reply-to 3321 --body "Hi Carol, legal is reviewing the contract and we should have it by Thursday."
```

```bash
spark draft --reply-to 7788 --body "The proposal looks good and we're in."
```

```bash
spark draft --edit 9012 --body "Friday works. I'll bring the metrics doc."
```

```bash
spark draft --to "alice@example.com" --subject "Q3 kickoff agenda" --body "Hi Alice,

Here is the agenda for the Q3 kickoff:
1. Budget review
2. Hiring plan
3. Migration timeline

Here is the link to the [planning doc](https://example.com/plan).

Best,"
```
